title: mumei feature state
description: Persistent per-feature state written atomically by hooks/_lib/state.sh. Lives at .mumei/specs/<feature>/state.json (spec vehicle) or .mumei/plans/<slug>/state.json (plan vehicle). Required fields are the intersection of both shapes.

phase.description: spec vehicle uses all 4 values; plan vehicle uses only implement / done.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC. Set on state-init, never updated.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC. Bumped on every state mutation.

id.description: Spec-vehicle stable identifier (REQ-N). Absent for plan-vehicle features (use `slug`).

current_wave.description: Spec vehicle: Wave number currently in flight. 0 before approval gate, 1+ during implement, equals last Wave during review. Absent for plan-vehicle features.

approved_at.description: Set on the spec-vehicle Phase 3.5 user approval transition. Plan vehicle does not set this field.

last_observed_head.description: git rev-parse HEAD captured by hooks at the most recent transition. Used to detect external commits.

vehicle.description: Set explicitly to 'plan' by mumei_state_init_plan. Spec-vehicle init does not write this field; readers should treat absence as 'spec'.

plan_file_path.description: Plan vehicle only. Path captured from ExitPlanMode tool input at plan-mode commit time.

pending_review.description: Plan vehicle only. Set true by post-task-event.sh when the last TaskCompleted matches task_created_count; cleared by /mumei:examine on PASS.

task_created_count.description: Plan vehicle only. Counter of TaskCreated events since plan-mode capture.

task_completed_count.description: Plan vehicle only. Counter of TaskCompleted events.

review_runs.description: Plan vehicle only. Append-only history of review iterations driven by /mumei:examine.

depends_on.description: Cross-feature dependency list. Populated from tasks.md _DependsOn:_ meta.
